org.jlab.epsci.ersap.base

Class ErsapSubscriptions.BaseDpeReportSubscription

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.jlab.epsci.ersap.base.ErsapSubscriptions.JsonReportSubscription
      • org.jlab.epsci.ersap.base.ErsapSubscriptions.BaseDpeReportSubscription
  • Enclosing class:
    ErsapSubscriptions

    public static class ErsapSubscriptions.BaseDpeReportSubscription
extends ErsapSubscriptions.JsonReportSubscription
    A subscription to listen for JSON reports from the DPEs.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ErsapSubscriptions.DpeReportSubscription parseJson()
      Parse the JSON report as DpeRegistrationData and DpeRuntimeData objects.
      void start(C callback)
      A background thread is started to receive messages from the service.
      void stop() 

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Method Detail

      • parseJson

        public ErsapSubscriptions.DpeReportSubscription parseJson()
        Parse the JSON report as DpeRegistrationData and DpeRuntimeData objects.
        Returns:
        A subscription to listen for reports from the DPEs.

      • start

        public void start(C callback)
           throws ErsapException
        A background thread is started to receive messages from the service. Every time a report is received, the provided callback will be executed. The messages are received sequentially, but the callback may run in extra background threads, so it must be thread-safe.
        Parameters:
        callback - the callback to be executed for every received message
        Throws:
        ErsapException - if the subscription failed to start

      • stop

        public void stop()
